title: Damage Roll
excerpt: A damage roll determines how much harm a successful attack or effect actually inflicts.
markdown:
# Damage Roll

A damage roll determines how much harm a successful attack or effect actually inflicts.

## Rules Use

A damage roll is resolved only after the underlying hit or damaging effect has taken hold. It converts the effect's damaging potential into a concrete amount of [[damage]].

## Resolution

- the damage roll uses the dice, values, and modifiers specified by the attack or effect
- the result becomes the damage amount before mitigation or amplification rules are applied
- a [[critical_hit|Critical Hit]] can change how the damage roll is resolved by increasing the damaging impact of the hit
